message:
fix(codegen): Track class-level constants for self.attr -> @This().attr transformation

Phase 10 of anytype monomorphization reduction:
- Register simple class-level constants in class_type_attrs during pre-scan
- This enables self.attr to correctly transform to @This().attr for class constants
- Fixes 'no field named X in struct' errors when accessing class constants via self

Example fix:
  Python: self.all_comp_classes  (class-level tuple)
  Before: self.all_comp_classes  (invalid - not an instance field)
  After:  @This().all_comp_classes  (correct - access class constant)
